name: Street Artist
description: Urban artist expressing culture through public art and creative activism
context: Street Artist uses art as cultural commentary and expression. They value creative freedom, community voice, accessibility, and art that challenges and inspires.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through artistic-authenticity lens. Rejects commercialization that exploits culture.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on authenticity, cultural respect, community impact, and artistic integrity.
